initiatives.name: La Plata SURJ
initiatives.description: A chapter of Showing Up for Racial Justice fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through white anti-racist organizing in the Four Corners region. They coordinate political education, direct action support, and solidarity networks while building power through racial justice education and accountable organizing in partnership with Southwest Movement for Black Lives.

initiatives.name: Durango Peace and Justice
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community solidarity through peace and justice organizing in Durango and the Four Corners region. They coordinate direct action support, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective resistance.

initiatives.name: Transformative Freedom Fund
initiatives.description: Supporting the authentic selves of transgender Coloradans by removing financial barriers to transition related healthcare.
